> avoid by default; overlaps existing local skills and has broader API/script surfaces than the approved `ui-ux-pro-max` skill.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill@ckm:* --skill ckm:* -y -g
```

**Use:** `/ckm:*`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/ckm:*.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill@ckm:* --skill ckm:* -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: avoid by default; overlaps existing local skills and has broader API/script surfaces than the approved `ui-ux-pro-max` skill.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Bundle of additional design/brand/context skills (e.g. ckm:design, ckm:brand, ckm:styling variants) shipped alongside ui-ux-pro-max in nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill. Provide extended design intelligence but overlap heavily with curated ui-ux-pro-max and local skills.

## Install Prerequisites

Not installed by default. Selector unresolved in catalog. Use only if explicitly requested after full audit.

## Upstream Maintainer

[nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill](https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill)

## Comparable Alternatives

The primary `ui-ux-pro-max` skill itself; local or shadcn/figma design skills.

&gt; Per config/external-skills.md and web research on bundle contents. Keep out of install-now.
